title: schizachyrium exile
intro: Schizachyrium exile, also known as Little Bluestem, is a type of grass native to the North American prairies. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are said to aid in wound healing and the treatment of various infections. The health benefits of Schizachyrium exile include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a promising natural remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Schizachyrium exile may include infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
